name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for ManjuForge
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

How would this feature help manju creators? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

If you have ideas on how to implement this feature, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request.
